goal: Stand up the tri-toolchain workspace skeleton: Cargo workspace with seven empty-but-compilable crates, pnpm workspace under adapters/, and uv Python env under ml/, plus the full §17 top-level directory tree.
plan_summary: Bundle F01 (workspace configs) and F10 (directory skeleton) since they overlap at the repo root. Executor creates Cargo.toml workspace, seven crate dirs under crates/ with lib.rs re-export shells, rust-toolchain.toml (stable, edition 2021), adapters/ pnpm workspace (package.json, tsconfig.json with strict settings, biome.json), ml/ uv project (pyproject.toml with ruff+mypy+pytest dev-deps), and all §17 directories committed with .gitkeep where empty. Populate scripts/verify/P0-W1-F10.sh with the real skeleton assertion. cargo build --workspace, pnpm -C adapters build, and uv build ml/ must all exit 0.
scope_in: Top-level Cargo.toml defining the workspace with seven member crates: ucil-core, ucil-daemon, ucil-cli, ucil-treesitter, ucil-lsp-diagnostics, ucil-agents, ucil-embeddings (exact names per §17).

crates/<name>/Cargo.toml + crates/<name>/src/lib.rs (re-exports only, no logic) for each of the seven crates. ucil-daemon and ucil-cli additionally get src/main.rs shells that compile and return Ok(()).
rust-toolchain.toml pinning stable channel; edition 2021 in every crate Cargo.toml.

adapters/package.json declaring a pnpm workspace, adapters/pnpm-workspace.yaml, adapters/tsconfig.json with strict:true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess:true, exactOptionalPropertyTypes:true, adapters/biome.json with defaults, and a trivial adapters/src/index.ts so pnpm build has something to compile.
ml/pyproject.toml declaring the uv-managed project with ruff, mypy, pytest dev-deps, python >= 3.11, and ml/src/ucil_ml/__init__.py (empty but importable) so uv build succeeds.

Full §17 directory tree present and committed: crates/, adapters/, adapters/templates/, plugins/{structural,search,knowledge,architecture,context,platform,quality,testing}/, ml/, ml/models/, tests/fixtures/, tests/integration/, tests/benchmarks/, scripts/, docs/, plugin/, plugin/.claude-plugin/, plugin/agents/, plugin/skills/, plugin/hooks/, plugin/.claude/rules/. Use .gitkeep for dirs that are intentionally empty in Phase 0.
scripts/verify/P0-W1-F10.sh replaced with a real test that asserts each required directory exists (and exits 1 with a clear message naming the first missing one).

Baseline ucil-core test in crates/ucil-core/tests/ so `cargo test -p ucil-core` has at least one passing assertion (e.g. a smoke test that the crate compiles and exposes a const VERSION). This is needed so F01's acceptance_tests selector `-p ucil-core` returns non-empty.
A .gitignore covering target/, node_modules/, .venv/, dist/, __pycache__/, .ucil/, and adapters/*/dist/.
scope_out: ucil-core types.rs content (QueryPlan, Symbol, etc.) — that is P0-W1-F02.
ucil init command wiring — that is P0-W1-F03 through F06.
CI YAML / workflow files — P0-W1-F08 (executor may stub a `.github/workflows/` dir with .gitkeep to satisfy the directory skeleton assertion, but no workflow logic).
Fixture project bodies (rust-project, python-project, typescript-project, mixed-project) — F11 through F14. Only the containing tests/fixtures/ directory exists in this WO.
Plugin manifests inside plugins/* — later phases.
Any src/ body beyond lib.rs re-exports and a single trivial smoke test per language.
Any adapter logic in adapters/src beyond an empty exported module.
acceptance: cargo build --workspace exits 0 on a clean `cargo clean` run.
cargo test -p ucil-core exits 0 (satisfies P0-W1-F01 acceptance_tests).
pnpm -C adapters install && pnpm -C adapters build exits 0.
Every directory named in §17 of the master plan is present (verified by P0-W1-F10.sh).
